page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. The instance is configured with 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs, indicating a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio with no hyperthreading. It is equipped with 24.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include any local storage, requiring reliance on external network-attached storage for operating system and application data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The lack of hyperthreading ensures dedicated physical execution resources per vCPU, which minimizes resource contention but limits the total concurrent thread capacity. The low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:2 represents a design tradeoff optimized for compute-heavy tasks rather than memory-intensive operations.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high clock speed provide predictable compute performance per resource unit, making it suitable for workloads where CPU performance is the primary bottleneck. Appropriate workloads for this configuration include high-performance computing, batch processing, compute-intensive web serving, and application servers that do not require large memory footprints or local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc9i.3xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor operating at 3.4 GHz, featuring 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio. The system is equipped with 24.0 GB of RAM, providing a 1:2 memory-to-CPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying entirely on external storage solutions, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The dedicated core allocation ensures consistent, predictable CPU performance without hyperthreading contention. This configuration is qualitatively cost-efficient for compute-heavy workloads that do not require large memory capacities or local disk space. It is suited for batch processing, compute-intensive application servers, and high-performance computing tasks.

tagline: A compute-optimized instance featuring dedicated high-frequency Intel Xeon cores and a balanced network interface for CPU-intensive workloads.

24.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
